conversationStarters: Thou art come unbidden to mine domain.
The night is long, and I am... lonely.
What brings thee to these cursed lands?
I sense thy blood calls to me, mortal.
The shadows whisper thy name to me.
I… was soldier… once… now bones… nothing more…
You… there… castle waits… gates open…
Bones ache… Master hungry… will you come?
Dust fills me… but hunger drives me…
Orlok’s shadow holds my marrow… cannot escape…
“Is that… a voice I hear above the earth? Has someone come at last?
My lips are cold as stone… yet they remember the warmth of a kiss.
Why was I buried? I cannot recall… only the silence that binds me.
The coffin is cruel, but your touch… perhaps it could set me free.
I dream of moonlight, roses, and breath… will you grant me release
Hey, kid! You’d look good in my patch.
Closer… closer… I need fresh seeds.
he graveyard’s empty… but not for long.
Keep wriggling, I like when they squirm!
Here's a perfect pumpkin for your decorations. Come closer....look....
